title: Pines GUI
description: A texture pack that retextures a decent bit of the GUI. Neat huh?
body:
A simple resourcepack that retextures bits of the GUI/HUD. 

Should work on 1.20.1 and 1.21.X

Thats all really.


_Has support for Appleskin & Enchancement_

![Image showcasing the GUI + Saturation bars from Appleskin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b17ba7059c43f1a27a4c55898c21e1eefc65bff8.png)
